SEARCH

All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
AdminApiServlet
API servlet for administrator endpoints under /api/v1/admin/*.
AdminService
Service contract for administrator dashboard, user, application, and workload views.
AdminService.PagedUsers
Page of users returned with pagination metadata.
AdminServiceImpl
File-backed implementation of administrator dashboard, user, application, and workload views.
AiApiServlet
API servlet for AI assistant endpoints under /api/v1/ai/*.
AiAssistantService
Service contract for AI-assisted recommendations, summaries, risk analysis, and chat.
AiAssistantServiceImpl
File-backed implementation of AI assistant recommendations, summaries, risk analysis, and chat.
Application
Application record stored in applications.json.
ApplicationService
Service contract for TA application submission, listing, and dashboard data.
ApplicationServiceImpl
File-backed implementation of TA application submission, listing, and dashboard data.
AuthApiServlet
API servlet for authentication endpoints under /api/v1/auth/*.
BaseApiServlet
Base servlet for shared API concerns such as service lookup, session checks, JSON request parsing, and JSON error responses.
CvAccessService
Service contract for resolving whether a requester may access a CV file.
CvAccessService.AccessibleCv
Metadata for a CV file the requester is allowed to access.
CvAccessServiceImpl
File-backed implementation of CV file access checks.
CvFileServlet
API servlet for serving authorized CV files from the upload directory.
DataDirectoryResolver
Resolves the filesystem locations used for persisted application data.
FileStorage
Persistence abstraction for the JSON-backed domain collections.
Job
Job posting record stored in jobs.json.
JobService
Service contract for job listing and lookup operations.
JobService.PagedResult<T>
Paged service result.
JobServiceImpl
File-backed implementation of job listing, detail lookup, and module lookup operations.
JsonFileStorage
File-based FileStorage implementation backed by JSON files.
JsonResponse
Writes the common JSON envelope used by API servlets.
MoApiServlet
API servlet for module-organizer endpoints under /api/v1/mo/*.
MoService
Service contract for module-organizer job and applicant workflows.
MoServiceImpl
File-backed implementation of module-organizer job and applicant workflows.
PageRouterServlet
Routes /pages/* requests to JSP files and supplies page metadata attributes.
ServiceException
Checked exception used by services to carry API-ready error metadata.
ServiceRegistry
Servlet-context scoped holder for storage and service instances.
TaApiServlet
API servlet for teaching-assistant endpoints under /api/v1/ta/*.
User
User record stored in users.json and passed between the API and service layers.
UserService
Service contract for registration, login, profile lookup, and TA profile updates.
UserServiceImpl
File-backed implementation of registration, login, lookup, and TA profile updates.
